title: Fix beads repository setup
description: Why: the repo's beads integration is stale and incomplete. The issue prefix is missing from the database, the tracked agent instructions have drifted from the current beads template, and shared git hooks are not installed. What: restore a working, shareable beads setup and update the tracked integration files.

title: Move release verify into hk
description:
Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:
- release:verify is currently implemented as a mise task shell script
- we want the verification logic managed by hk instead
- update task wiring/docs so release verification still works through project tooling

What done looks like:
- hk config contains the release verification step
- mise release:verify delegates to hk
- relevant docs mention the new wiring if needed

title: Fix yamllint findings in GitHub Actions workflows
description: Why: yamllint reports findings in .github/workflows/*.yml that should be fixed in-place where possible.\n\nWhat: update workflow YAML to satisfy yamllint and only add rule-specific ignores if a workflow-specific construct cannot be expressed cleanly without them.

title: Adjust release task flow
description: Align mise release tasks so local release orchestration verifies and versions the release, while publish remains a separate step for tag-driven release CI.
notes: Implemented: simplified CI to drop the shared setup action, moved release orchestration into mise release/release:version, switched tag CI to release:publish, and enabled hk's pklr backend so pkl tool installation is no longer required. Validation: mise run test, mise run build, mise exec actionlint -- actionlint, and mise exec goreleaser -- goreleaser check passed. mise run check still fails on pre-existing repository yamllint findings outside this change set.

title: Inline bridge helper release build in GoReleaser and drop duplicate audit task
description: Why: build:bridge-helpers is only used by GoReleaser, and audit duplicates the hk slow-profile security steps. What: inline the bridge helper shell script into .goreleaser.yaml, remove the audit task from mise.toml, update task dependencies/documentation so security checks are represented by lint:slow instead of a separate audit task.
notes: Implemented: inlined bridge helper pre-build in .goreleaser.yaml, removed build:bridge-helpers and lint:slow/audit tasks from mise, and made hk slow-profile steps unconditional so lint runs all checks. Validation: mise run test, mise run build, and goreleaser check passed. mise run check still fails on pre-existing repository lint findings outside this change set (.beads/README.md markdownlint, SECURITY.md markdownlint, and workflow lint findings).
